svg.text: Steve Griffing, PE(CSE), CISSP-ISSEP, CPP · CC BY 4.0 · 2026
BamJr remix CC BY 4.0 · sector/bevel/crown gear train
Hull: Peter Farell CC BY 4.0 · Nozzle: BamJr CC BY 4.0 · Visual inspiration: Firefly/Serenity © Joss Whedon/Mutant Enemy/Universal — Fan engineering work
Insert M1.5×8mm pivot pins through all 8 flap hinge holes · oil each pin
Thread inner ring into outer housing — rotate smoothly with light pressure
Mount SG90 bracket on outer housing (FUSELAGE nozzle only — NOT nacelle)
Bayonet-lock assembled nozzle onto nacelle aft end (quarter turn)
Press-fit crown pinion onto 3mm CF longitudinal shaft · Loctite 638
Install sector gear on tilt bracket · adjust mesh for 0.1-0.2mm backlash
Sweep nacelle 0°→90°: verify nozzle closes/opens smoothly
Gear ratio: 90° nacelle = 70.7° ring rotation. Verify exit: 36mm closed, 42mm open
Nacelle nozzle has NO servo — passive gear coupling only
Fuselage 40mm nozzle uses SG90 servo → Pico 2 GP15
